title: Complete Interactions API Tool Turn and Provider Context Circulation · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: A multilingual public-benefits intake and accessibility team. They need a bounded Gemini interaction that validates structured intake, selects one narrow eligibility-information tool, preserves call-result provenance, refuses unsupported decisions, and produces an accessible next-step record. Planned artifact: Deliver Structured Public-Service Intake Assistant with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Define stakeholder, user population, decision, task distribution, observable value, failure, review cadence, and non-goals before choosing a model.
Validate provider output with strict Pydantic models, explicit bounds, discriminated variants, forbidden extras, and actionable errors.
Specify required properties, types, bounds, patterns, enums, nested limits, and additional-property policy with a supported schema subset.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Project Stakeholder Task
steps.instruction:
project case — A project agent engineering team handles case 2224 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to execute one complete Interactions API tool turn with step classification, call-result correlation, provider context preservation, and final provenance; telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable; then change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Final Output Provenance
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-final-output-provenance-16xo6s" that uses case 3408 to execute one complete Interactions API tool turn with step classification, call-result correlation, provider context preservation, and final provenance. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-final-output-provenance-16xo6s
# Competency: agentpy-final-output-provenance.
# Case 3408: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_final_output_provenance_16xo6s(model_steps: int = 6, tool_calls: int = 2, tool_results: int = 2, final_outputs: int = 1, lost_provider_context: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_16xo6s = "16xo6s-s6ox61-3408"
    assert evidence_variant_16xo6s
    evidence_axes_16xo6s = (
        "authority16xo6s",
        "interaction3408",
        "tools6ox61",
        "state16xo6s3408",
        "evaluation340816xo6s",
        "recoverys6ox613408",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_16xo6s)) == 6
    if model_steps < 3 or tool_calls < 1:
        return False, model_steps, "tool-turn-shape"
    if tool_results != tool_calls:
        return False, tool_results, "tool-result-gap"
    if final_outputs != 1:
        return False, final_outputs, "final-output-count"
    if lost_provider_context > 0:
        return False, lost_provider_context, "provider-context-loss"
    assert tool_results == tool_calls and final_outputs == 1
    return True, tool_results, "complete-tool-turn"
